# Amreen Constructions Pvt Ltd

> Amreen Constructions Pvt Ltd is a residential and commercial construction company based in Warangal, Telangana, India, with 33+ years of experience building villas, apartments, and commercial projects. The company is led by Managing Director Md Shafi Ahmed and operates under the tagline "Turning Land Into Landmarks."

## About

- **Company:** Amreen Constructions Pvt Ltd
- **Founded:** 1992
- **Location:** Warangal, Telangana, India
- **Phone:** +91 8985091276
- **Website:** https://amreenconstructions.com/
- **Leadership:** Md Shafi Ahmed (Managing Director), Rumana Amreen (Assistant Director), Adnan Ahmed (Financial Head)

## Services

- **Villa construction** — Independent houses and luxury villas, design through handover
- **Apartment construction** — Multi-unit residential buildings, planning to occupancy certificate
- **Commercial construction** — Office buildings, retail spaces, and mixed-use developments
- **Turnkey construction** — End-to-end build: design, approvals, structure, finishes, fittings, all in one contract
- **Plot development** — Layout planning and infrastructure for land parcels
- **Renovation and interior works** — Existing-structure upgrades

## Service Area

Warangal, Hanamkonda, Kazipet, and surrounding districts of Telangana, India. Larger commercial projects are taken on further afield across Telangana.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://amreenconstructions.com/): Company overview, expertise, leadership, testimonials, contact
- [Blog](https://amreenconstructions.com/blog.html): Construction insights, market analysis, buying guides

## Articles

- [House Construction Cost in Warangal (2026 Guide)](https://amreenconstructions.com/blog-house-construction-cost-warangal.html): Per-square-foot rates, material costs, and how to budget for a home build in Warangal.
- [What Is Turnkey Construction?](https://amreenconstructions.com/blog-turnkey-construction-explained.html): How turnkey contracts work, what they include, and when they make sense.
- [Vastu Tips for House Construction](https://amreenconstructions.com/blog-vastu-tips-house-construction.html): Practical orientation, lighting, and layout principles drawn from traditional vastu.
- [5 Essential Checks Before Buying a Plot in Warangal](https://amreenconstructions.com/blog-plot-buying-checks.html): Title clearance, layout approvals, infrastructure, and due diligence.
- [Warangal Real Estate Outlook 2026](https://amreenconstructions.com/blog-warangal-market-2026.html): Smart City investment, Hyderabad corridor, and demand drivers.
- [33 Years of Building Trust: Our Story](https://amreenconstructions.com/blog-our-story.html): Company history and values.

## Contact

For project enquiries, site visits, or document reviews: +91 8985091276 (call or WhatsApp), or visit the contact section at https://amreenconstructions.com/#contact
